name: io.github.jeenyjai/mcp-test-utils
title: MCP Test Utils
description: Desktop UI automation for AI agents: screenshots, windows, mouse, keyboard, UI Automation, OCR

environmentVariables.name: MCP_LOG_DIR
environmentVariables.description: Directory for logging sessions (opt-in). Without it, logging tools are hidden.

environmentVariables.name: MCP_LOG_MAX_MB
environmentVariables.description: Session size limit in MB. Warning on exceed.

environmentVariables.name: MCP_LOG_RETAIN_DAYS
environmentVariables.description: Auto-delete log sessions older than N days. 0 to disable.
